dict.string: Show current Claude Code 5-hour block usage via ccusage.

export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH"
# Append newest nvm-installed node, if any if [ -d "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" ]; then NVM_NODE_DIR="$(ls -d "$HOME"/.nvm/versions/node/*/bin 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n1)" [ -n "$NVM_NODE_DIR" ] && export PATH="$NVM_NODE_DIR:$PATH" fi
NODE_BIN="$(command -v node || true)" if [ -z "$NODE_BIN" ]; then for p in /opt/homebrew/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node "$HOME/.bun/bin/node"; do [ -x "$p" ] && NODE_BIN="$p" && break done fi
if [ -z "$NODE_BIN" ]; then echo '{"items":[{"title":"Node not found","subtitle":"Install Node (or Bun) so ccusage can run","valid":false}]}' exit 0 fi
"$NODE_BIN" usage.js

Type "ccu" to see your Claude Code session + weekly usage, the same numbers as /usage.
Requires Node 18+ and a Claude Code login (OAuth, not an API key). Sign in once with `claude`.
Data source: GET https://api.anthropic.com/api/oauth/usage, undocumented, beta, read-only. Your OAuth token is read from the macOS Keychain, then ~/.claude/.credentials.json. Nothing is sent anywhere except Anthropic.
Notes: the endpoint rate-limits hard, so results are cached ~180s. If the beta header (oauth-2025-04-20) changes, it may 401 until updated. Optional workflow variables: CC_UA (User-Agent), CC_CACHE_SECONDS.
